  • Uses of Client in controller

    Methods in controller that return Client
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Client
    LoginController.getClientByCode(Client client)
    Retrieves a client by calling the getClientByCode method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns it.
    Methods in controller that return types with arguments of type Client
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Client>
    LoginController.getAllClient()
    Retrieves a list of all clients by calling the getAllClient method of the ClientDAO implementation and returns it.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    LoginController.deleteClient(Client client)
    Deletes a client by calling the deleteClient method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
    Client
    LoginController.getClientByCode(Client client)
    Retrieves a client by calling the getClientByCode method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns it.
    boolean
    LoginController.insertClient(Client client)
    Inserts a new client by calling the insertClient method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
    boolean
    LoginController.updateClientByCode(Client client)
    Updates a client by calling the updateClientByCode method of the ClientDAO implementation with the provided client object and returns the result.
